mapper.select: SELECT ta.id as assignmentId, c.id as courseId, c.course_code as courseCode, c.course_name as courseName, t.id as teacherId, t.name as teacherName, ta.semester, CASE WHEN e.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as evaluated FROM edu_course_selection cs JOIN edu_teaching_assignment ta ON cs.teaching_assignment_id = ta.id JOIN edu_course c ON ta.course_id = c.id JOIN edu_teacher t ON ta.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN edu_evaluation e ON e.evaluator_id = #{studentId} AND e.course_id = c.id AND e.target_teacher_id = t.id AND e.evaluator_type = 'student' WHERE cs.student_id = #{studentId} AND cs.status = 1 ORDER BY ta.semester DESC

SELECT t.id as teacherId, t.name as teacherName, t.teacher_no as teacherNo, t.title, col.college_name as collegeName, CASE WHEN e.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as evaluated FROM edu_teacher t JOIN edu_college col ON t.college_id = col.id LEFT JOIN edu_evaluation e ON e.evaluator_id = #{teacherId} AND e.target_teacher_id = t.id AND e.evaluator_type = 'teacher' WHERE t.id != #{teacherId} AND t.status = 1 AND t.college_id = (SELECT college_id FROM edu_teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) ORDER BY t.name

SELECT AVG(total_score) as avgScore, COUNT(1) as totalCount, ( SELECT grade_level FROM edu_evaluation WHERE target_teacher_id = #{teacherId} GROUP BY grade_level ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC LIMIT 1 ) as gradeLevel FROM edu_evaluation WHERE target_teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_valid = 1
AND semester = #{semester}
